docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MJB STEEL PRODUCTS CO. AS TO DEFENDANT FERDON, WILLIAM RICHMOND HILL CONSTRUCTION DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JAN-06-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-08-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       DEC-17-1993
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MJB STEEL PRODUCTS CO. SERVED SEP-15-1993, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FERDON, WILLIAM RICHMOND HILL CONSTRUCTION

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $130.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MJB STEEL PRODUCTS CO. AS TO DEFENDANT FERDON, WILLIAM RICHMOND HILL CONSTRUCTION
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-06-1994, CONTINUED TO MAR-07-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-07-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON MAR-07-1994, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR APR-06-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF APR-06-1994, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON APR-06-1994, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-06-1994 CONTINUED FROM APR-06-1994 TO MAY-06-1994 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-06-1994, CONTINUED TO JUL-05-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 SANCTIONS STAYED UNTIL 7/5/94. FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY 7/5/94. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
